About & FAQ

TQ SDE Complements

Comparing Singularity_Previous (Build: 3306948) to Singularity_Next (Build: 3336176)

Want to be notified of new patches? Hop into #hoboleaks on Tweetfleet Slack! Instructions on how to join Tweetfleet Slack here.
Please note that Singularity will be kept inaccessible except for specific testing windows, and may fall significantly behind Tranquility in patches. The Tranquility/Singularity diff (homepage) may not be particularly useful for the time being. Refer to the latest Tranquility patches instead.

Find Hoboleaks useful and want to provide some support at no additional cost to yourself?
Use affiliate code HL (short for HoboLeaks) the next time you make a purchase through the official EVE store, which has Omega, PLEX, and much more. The small commission we receive helps Hoboleaks remain ad-free. Thank you! ♥

No errors - you shouldn't see this text.

93150 - Secret Operations <font size="14">Secrets Operations Expert System</font>

This Expert System has.... secrets

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active 1 day rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 Standard Expert Systems

93250 - Damaged Stargate (Caldari System) This gate has been badly damaged by an unexpected catastrophic hyperspace event. While it remains functional, spacetime around the gate has been fractured by the event.

Long-term exposure to the damaged spacetime environment or the blackbody radiation emanating from it can result in serious illness and even death. As such, repairs to the gate have been postponed to such a time as a safe working environment can be established.		 Stargate

93306 - Rourke’s Tempest An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93307 - Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93309 - Ruud’s Vindicator An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93336 - Rurik’s Raven An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93337 - Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93338 - Thorrun’s Machariel An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracised her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93343 - Imperial Supremacy - Limited A license for the single use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has been bound, and though it can only be used once no sequence binders are required when it is consumed in the sequencing of a SKIN license.		 Ship SKIN Design Element

93344 - Imperial Supremacy - Unlimited A license for the unlimited use of a pattern in SKIN sequencing, once activated and inside your SKINR collection.

The digital sequence of this pattern license has not been bound, allowing for its unlimited use. However, every time you sequence a design using this pattern you must provide <a href=showinfo:81348>Alignment Sequencer</a> to bind the unique SKIN licenses you are producing. 93451 - Babout’s Hyperion An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93452 - Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93453 - Talman’s Bhaalgorn An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93486 - Babout’s Thorax An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93487 - Razili’s Omen Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93488 - Ruud’s Vigilant An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93489 - Rourke’s Rupture An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93490 - Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93491 - Thorrun’s Cynabal An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracized her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93492 - Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93493 - Oran’s Arbitrator An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers
Click to toggle showing the 78 attributes. descriptionID: 1043176
typeID: 93493
graphicID: 298
Capacity: 400.0

93494 - Talman’s Ashimmu An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93495 - Babout’s Incursus An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates

93496 - Oran’s Executioner An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates

93497 - Rourke’s Vigil An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates

93498 - Rurik’s Merlin An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Frigates

93592 - Warpath Operational Intel Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities.

This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.

Quartermaster Traders locations:
Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.
Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.
Gallente: Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.
Minmatar: Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.		 Special Edition Commodities

93593 - Warpath Command Intel Intel about command-level operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through high levels of activity in military activities.

This intel is of great value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.

Quartermaster Traders locations:
Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.
Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.

93626 - Oran’s Apocalypse An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93627 - Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93634 - Yosuke’s Nightmare An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Battleships

93743 - Probe Fleet Issue Capsuleer Day XXIII SKIN This SKIN marks the 23rd anniversary of the rise of the capsuleers by honoring the system they turned into the economic heart of New Eden. In YC128, Jita finds itself at the heart of the Warpath conflict. Carry its star with pride as a reminder of the power for change all capsuleers wield.

This SKIN will be activated and added directly to your SKIN collection when redeemed.		 Permanent SKIN

93778 - Basic Capsuleer Day XXIII Glamourex Booster This booster has been produced and distributed by Impetus and CONCORD to celebrate the 22nd anniversary of the first independent capsuleer licenses. Working much like the Social skill this highly potent booster provides a 20% bonus to agent, corporation and faction standing increases.

Volatile compounds were used to create this booster, limiting its shelf life. It will cease to function after June 9, YC128.		 Booster

93784 - Omen Lavacore Imperial SKIN The Amarr Empire has been exploiting lava planets for the rich resources to be had from the constant churn of magma for ages past. The vast territories controlled by the Amarr contain hundreds of such planets and the expertise of their planetary extraction engineers in the field of lava planet mining is well known across New Eden.

Empress Catiz I's own family, House Tash-Murkon, has considerable interests in the mining industries and is noted for its extensive harvesting of resources from the many lava planets it directly controls through its regional fief. The "Lavacore Imperial" nanocoating is testament to the flaming riches of the Amarr Empire's lava planets and the vast wealth that the Empress herself has derived from such worlds.		 Permanent SKIN

93845 - Capsuleer Day YC128 <font size="14">Capsuleer Day YC128 Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly T2 assault frigates.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for seven days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 Standard Expert Systems
Click to toggle showing the 12 attributes. descriptionID: 1042500

93850 - Master Security Node The master device that controls this site's security systems. If any unauthorized ships venture too close, the Master Security Node is programmed to trigger a site Lockdown.

Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, aborting an active Lockdown.		 Spawn Container

93886 - Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93887 - Rurik’s Moa An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93889 - Yosuke’s Phantasm An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.		 Warpath Elite Mercenaries - Cruisers

93999 - Imperial Navy Bastion Module An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 Siege Module
Click to toggle showing the 66 attributes. descriptionID: 1043354

94008 - Republic Fleet Bastion Module An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

94010 - Caldari Navy Bastion Module An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 Siege Module

94032 - Vengeance Mandate of Faith SKIN As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. Permanent SKIN

94033 - Stork State Regulator SKIN The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor. Permanent SKIN

94035 - Deimos Presidential Agent SKIN Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary. Permanent SKIN

94036 - Maelstrom Stark Strategist SKIN The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. Permanent SKIN

267761 "A den of thieves, scoundrels, bandits, black market dealers, gamblers, pimps and prostitutes. All in all, a nice place for a holiday"

1039445 I've opened a secure channel that you can use to reach me should you find yourself in need of guidance during your travels in New Eden.

Simply open the window and ask me a question. I'll return with any insights that I can provide and try not to lead you to another untimely demise.		 I've opened a secure channel that you can use to reach me should you find yourself in need of guidance during your travels in New Eden.

Simply open the window and ask me a question. I'll return with any insights that I can provide and try not to lead you to another untimely demise.		 Part of conversation "Aura Guidance Intro"
1039500 Q2 YC128 Q2 YC128
1039503 Secret Operations Secret Operations Name of item 93150 (Standard Expert Systems)
1039504 <font size="14">Secrets Operations Expert System</font>

This Expert System has.... secrets

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active 1 day rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14"><b>Secrets Operations Expert System</b></font>

This Expert System has.... secrets

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active <b>1 day</b> rental period.
As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.</i>		 Description of item "Secret Operations" (93150)

1039824 {[character]characterID.name} at risk of being removed from {corporation} due to poor faction standing {[character]characterID.name} at risk of being removed from {corporation} due to poor faction standing UI/FactionWarfare/Notifications/CharacterKickFromCorpIndividualStandingWarningSubject
1039825 {[character]characterID.nameWithPossessive, linkify} standing with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name} has dropped too low, which may lead to their removal from {corporation}.

According to {corporation}'s agreement with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}, all members must maintain a personal base standing with them of at least {requiredStanding} while participating in Faction Warfare on behalf of {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}. Therefore, {[character]characterID.name} must raise their base standing from {characterStanding} to at least {requiredStanding} within {[timeinterval]warningDuration.writtenForm, from=day, to=hour}, otherwise they will be removed from the corporation.		 {[character]characterID.nameWithPossessive, linkify} standing with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name} has dropped too low, which may lead to their removal from {corporation}.

According to {corporation}'s agreement with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}, all members must maintain a personal base standing with them of at least {requiredStanding} while participating in Faction Warfare on behalf of {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}. Therefore, <b>{[character]characterID.name} must raise their base standing from {characterStanding} to at least {requiredStanding} within {[timeinterval]warningDuration.writtenForm, from=day, to=hour}</b>, otherwise they will be removed from the corporation. 1039875 {corporation} at risk of being removed from Faction Warfare due to CEO's poor faction standing {corporation} at risk of being removed from Faction Warfare due to CEO's poor faction standing UI/FactionWarfare/Notifications/CorporationKickCeoIndividualStandingWarningSubject
1039876 {[character]characterID.nameWithPossessive, linkify} standing with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name} has dropped too low. As {[character]characterID.name} is the CEO of {corporation}, this may lead to {corporation} being dropped from Faction Warfare.

According to {corporation}'s agreement with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}, all members must maintain a personal base standing with them of at least {requiredStanding} while participating in Faction Warfare on behalf of {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}. Therefore, {[character]characterID.name} must raise their base standing from {characterStanding} to at least {requiredStanding} within {[timeinterval]warningDuration.writtenForm, from=day, to=hour}, otherwise the corporation will no longer be able to participate in Faction Warfare on behalf of {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}		 {[character]characterID.nameWithPossessive, linkify} standing with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name} has dropped too low. 1039878 {[character]characterID.nameWithPossessive, linkify} standing with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name} has dropped too low. As {[character]characterID.name} is the CEO of alliance member {corporationLink}, this may lead to {alliance} being dropped from Faction Warfare.

According to {alliance}'s agreement with {[npcOrganization]factionID.name}, all members must maintain a personal base standing with them of at least {requiredStanding} while participating in Faction Warfare on their behalf. 1042107 This SKIN marks the 23rd anniversary of the rise of the capsuleers by honoring the system they turned into the economic heart of New Eden. In YC128, Jita finds itself at the heart of the Warpath conflict. Carry its star with pride as a reminder of the power for change all capsuleers wield. This SKIN marks the 23rd anniversary of the rise of the capsuleers by honoring the system they turned into the economic heart of New Eden. 1042164 This SKIN marks the 23rd anniversary of the rise of the capsuleers by honoring the system they turned into the economic heart of New Eden. In YC128, Jita finds itself at the heart of the Warpath conflict. Carry its star with pride as a reminder of the power for change all capsuleers wield. 1042312 The Amarr Empire has been exploiting lava planets for the rich resources to be had from the constant churn of magma for ages past. The vast territories controlled by the Amarr contain hundreds of such planets and the expertise of their planetary extraction engineers in the field of lava planet mining is well known across New Eden.

Empress Catiz I's own family, House Tash-Murkon, has considerable interests in the mining industries and is noted for its extensive harvesting of resources from the many lava planets it directly controls through its regional fief. The "Lavacore Imperial" nanocoating is testament to the flaming riches of the Amarr Empire's lava planets and the vast wealth that the Empress herself has derived from such worlds.		 The Amarr Empire has been exploiting lava planets for the rich resources to be had from the constant churn of magma for ages past. The vast territories controlled by the Amarr contain hundreds of such planets and the expertise of their planetary extraction engineers in the field of lava planet mining is well known across New Eden.

The "Lavacore Imperial" nanocoating is testament to the flaming riches of the Amarr Empire's lava planets and the vast wealth that the Empress herself has derived from such worlds.

1042499 Capsuleer Day YC128 Capsuleer Day YC128 Name of item 93845 (Standard Expert Systems)
1042500 <font size="14">Capsuleer Day YC128 Expert System</font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly T2 assault frigates.

The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for seven days.

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14">Activating an Expert System</font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.		 <font size="14"><b>Capsuleer Day YC128 Expert System</b></font>

This Expert System makes available skills enabling a capsuleer to fly T2 assault frigates.

<b>The temporary skills provided by this Expert System last for seven days.</b>

An Expert System is a remote, restricted artificial intelligence providing you with access to certain skills during the active rental period. As it is independent from your clone and your capsule, an active Expert System is not lost on pod death or clone jump.

<font size="14"><b>Activating an Expert System</b></font>

Activation of an Expert System is automatic upon redemption of the item by the specific capsuleer intending to use the service.

<i>Expert Systems are a product developed by the PKN Interstellar consortium, made available over the HyperNet FTL communications network, and marketed by PKN Interstellar member corporations. An Expert System is a restricted AI based on artificial gelbrain technology. As the Expert System uses neural pathways based on those created by skill training or skill injection, it is compatible with capsule-ship interface and control systems. Real time command and control communication is achieved using dedicated FTL channels on PKN Interstellar's HyperNet.</i>		 Description of item "Capsuleer Day YC128" (93845)
1042509 Master Security Node Master Security Node Name of item 93850 (Spawn Container)
1042510 The master device that controls this site's security systems. If any unauthorized ships venture too close, the Master Security Node is programmed to trigger a site Lockdown.

Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, aborting an active Lockdown.		 The master device that controls this site's security systems. If any unauthorized ships venture too close, the Master Security Node is programmed to trigger a site Lockdown.

Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, aborting an active Lockdown.		 Description of item "Master Security Node" (93850)
1042528 Confinement Node Confinement Node Name of item 93868 (Large Collidable Structure)
1042529 A structure primed to deploy interdiction bubbles in the event of a site Lockdown.

Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, rendering it inactive during a Lockdown.		 A structure primed to deploy interdiction bubbles in the event of a site Lockdown.

Its security protocols can be hacked by a data analyzer, rendering it inactive during a Lockdown.		 Description of item "Confinement Node" (93868)
1042533 Sneaky Site - Amarr Guards (Do not Translate) Sneaky Site - Amarr Guards (Do not Translate) Name of item 93869 (Invisible Beacon)
1042548 This gate has been badly damaged by an unexpected catastrophic hyperspace event. While it remains functional, spacetime around the gate has been fractured by the event.

Long-term exposure to the damaged spacetime environment or the blackbody radiation emanating from it can result in serious illness and even death. As such, repairs to the gate have been postponed to such a time as a safe working environment can be established.		 This gate has been badly damaged by an unexpected catastrophic hyperspace event. While it remains functional, spacetime around the gate has been fractured by the event.

Long-term exposure to the damaged spacetime environment or the blackbody radiation emanating from it can result in serious illness and even death. As such, repairs to the gate have been postponed to such a time as a safe working environment can be established.		 Description of item "Damaged Stargate (Caldari Constellation)" (93252)

1042609 Warpath Supply Cache Warpath Supply Cache Name of item 93877 (Limited Rarities)
1042610 A cache of parts and basic military supplies that, while not greatly useful to a capsuleer, can be sold at stations run by key government or military organizations for ISK. A cache of parts and basic military supplies that, while not greatly useful to a capsuleer, can be sold at stations run by key government or military organizations for ISK. Description of item "Warpath Supply Cache" (93877)
1042611 Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities.

This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.

Quartermaster Traders locations:
Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.
Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.
Gallente: Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.
Minmatar: Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.		 Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities.

This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.

Quartermaster Traders locations:
<b>Amarr: </b>Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.
<b>Caldari: </b>New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.
<b>Gallente: </b>Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.
<b>Minmatar: </b>Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.		 Description of item "Warpath Operational Intel" (93592)
1042612 Intel about command-level operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through high levels of activity in military activities.

This intel is of great value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders.

Quartermaster Traders locations:
Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime.
Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen.
Gallente: Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent.
Minmatar: Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.		 Intel about command-level operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through high levels of activity in military activities.

1042655 Tiered Challenge Rewards
Hireling: 40 points, 30 x Warpath Operational Intel.
Mercenary: 60 points, 50 x Warpath Operational Intel.
Privateer: 90 points, 70 x Warpath Operational Intel.
Dog of War: 130 points, 100 x Warpath Operational Intel.
Warpath Master: 180 points, 10x Plex.

Completing tiered challenges is followed by a repeatable challenge that only awards points.
*Trading challenges do not award Warpath Operational Intel.		 <b>Tiered Challenge Rewards</b>
Hireling: 40 points, 30 x Warpath Operational Intel.

Warpath Master: 180 points, 10x Plex.

Completing tiered challenges is followed by a repeatable challenge that only awards points.
*Trading challenges do not award Warpath Operational Intel.

1042968 Your body tells a story of not just your life, but the lives that came before it. It is a book made from DNA strands, damaged cells, chipped bone, and written in blood ink.

1043132 A contested hub for this system's War Grid. The three complexes that govern control of the grid are under threat from enemy forces. A contested hub for this system's War Grid. The three complexes that govern control of the grid are under threat from enemy forces.
1043133 Enemy forces are attacking the three complexes that control this system’s War Grid, a network of local combat installations.
Defend and secure the complexes before the operational window closes. Once the situation is resolved, compensation earned may be claimed from inside the extraction point.

Time to complete: Approximately 25 minutes.
Hostiles: Enemy Empire forces and Mercenary Elites.
Size: 1 pilot.
Roles: Enforcer.
Ship Restrictions: Complexes can only be secured by battleships or smaller.		 Enemy forces are attacking the three complexes that control this system’s War Grid, a network of local combat installations.

1043144 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 Description of item "Babout’s Hyperion" (93451)
1043145 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 Description of item "Rurik’s Raven" (93336)
1043148 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 Description of item "Oran’s Apocalypse" (93626)
1043149 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 Description of item "Rourke’s Tempest" (93306)
1043150 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 Description of item "Ortega’s Megathron Navy Issue" (93307)
1043151 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 Description of item "Kuma’s Scorpion Navy Issue" (93337)
1043152 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 Description of item "Razili’s Armageddon Navy Issue" (93452)
1043153 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 Description of item "Lilja’s Typhoon Fleet Issue" (93627)
1043154 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 Description of item "Ruud’s Vindicator" (93309)
1043155 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracised her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracised her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.		 Description of item "Thorrun’s Machariel" (93338)
1043158 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.		 Description of item "Talman’s Bhaalgorn" (93453)
1043159 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Captain Angela Babout was one of the Federation’s most decorated pilots. During the conflict of YC112 she was part of the assault that took out the titan Shiigeru above her home planet of Caldari Prime. After witnessing the devastation that its collision with the planet caused, she quit the Navy and became a Mercenary.		 Description of item "Babout’s Thorax" (93486)
1043173 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Yoshi Rurik found himself destitute and in debt after the corp he was contracted was shuttered due to dishonorable dealings. Refusing to accept death, he fought his way out of the gutter and built a new life from blood and iron.		 Description of item "Rurik’s Moa" (93887)
1043176 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Born in the Amarr Empire, but of Matari heritage, Orlando Oran won back his freedom through military service. Once he was free, he was not interested in tying himself to a clan he did not know or tribe he had never felt connected to. Instead, he chose the ultimate freedom of life as a freelancer.		 Description of item "Oran’s Arbitrator" (93493)
1043177 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Not many Thukkers leave the Great Wildlands to enlist in the Republic Fleet, but Commander Lucan Rourke was never one to follow the herd. While at first he was seen as a daring maverick by his commanding officers, he was eventually discharged when the top brass began to see him as more of an unhinged lunatic.		 Description of item "Rourke’s Rupture" (93489)
1043182 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Thomasina Razili grew up as that rarest of things, an atheist Amarr holder. When she could no longer stomach pretending that she shared her family’s faith, she stole a ship and left to build a life grounded in logic and reason. That this life ended up being structured around violence may, however, be more a result of her personal predilections than any core tenets of rational thinking.		 Description of item "Razili’s Omen Navy Issue" (93487)
1043183 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Rumors circulate that Kuma was raised by Storm Bears in the wilds of Caldari Prime, and this is why she cannot speak. They say that she mastered human weapons after hunters killed her adopted family and that now she accepts ISK as a means to enact her revenge on the species that took everything from her. While the rumors may be false, her deadly fury is an undeniable fact.		 Description of item "Kuma’s Exequror Navy Issue" (93490)
1043184 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Commodore Julienne Ortega is something of a strategic prodigy, having graduated from the Federal Navy Academy at 17. She was assigned to intelligence analysis, but became increasingly frustrated by the lack of action and the limited thinking of her peers. Eventually, she resigned her commission and took up as a mercenary rather than remain stuck behind a desk.		 Description of item "Ortega’s Vexor Navy Issue" (93492)
1043185 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

After the devastation of her home planet of Turnur, Nora Lilja became for a became a part of the Ashes of Turnur anti-technology crusade. Once her rage subsided, however, she began to clash with the group's thinking and reject its teachings. Still feeling unmoored from the Republic, she chose to go it alone, putting her skills to use for anyone with the ISK to pay for them.		 Description of item "Lilja’s Scythe Fleet Issue" (93886)
1043186 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

A former Serpentis executive, Markos Ruud joined the Federation Navy after his entire family died in an industrial accident caused by the corporation’s cavalier attitude to health and safety. An unwavering devotee to his own moral code, Ruud is not a mercenary by design, but he uses his knowledge of Serpentis vessels to earn the capital he needs to enact his revenge.		 Description of item "Ruud’s Vigilant" (93488)
1043187 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. Now they work as a mercenary to earn the money they need to build up their own totalitarian dictatorship “the right way”, without mind control.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Sasha Yosuke was born a True Citizen of Sansha’s Nation. After realizing the true horror of their people, they fled. 1043190 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Walid Talman is sure beyond a shadow of doubt that he is a true Savant of the Sani Sabik. It brings him great rage that the priests of his faith do not agree, citing his mercantile obsession with the profane as proof that he is not a chosen soul. He has left the order to prove his worthiness at any cost, ignoring the irony that this action may just prove his detractors right.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

Despite once being their greatest warrior, Mara Thorrun’s obsession with Angel Cartel technology ostracized her from the rest of her clan. Now she fights for ISK, but it is the chance to kill with her beloved vessels that is her real reward.		 An Elite Mercenary willing to work for any faction during the Warpath conflict.

1043288 Enemy forces are attacking the three complexes that control this system’s War Grid, a network of local combat installations.
Defend and secure the complexes before the operational window closes. Once the situation is resolved, compensation earned may be claimed from inside the extraction point.

Time to complete: Approximately 25 minutes.
Hostiles: Enemy Empire forces and Mercenary Elites.
Size: 1 pilot.
Roles: Enforcer.
Ship Restrictions: Complexes can only be secured by battleships or smaller.		 Enemy forces are attacking the three complexes that control this system’s War Grid, a network of local combat installations.

1043350 Shield Booster Duration and Capacitor Bonus Shield Booster Duration and Capacitor Bonus Name of attribute "bastionModeShieldBoosterCapDurationBonus" (6187)
1043351 Shield Booster Duration and Capacitor Bonus Shield Booster Duration and Capacitor Bonus
1043352 Reduces the cycle time and capacitor cost of Shield Boosters improving repair throughput. Reduces the cycle time and capacitor cost of Shield Boosters improving repair throughput.
1043353 Imperial Navy Bastion Module Imperial Navy Bastion Module Name of item 93999 (Siege Module)
1043354 An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 Description of item "Imperial Navy Bastion Module" (93999)

1043386 Imperial Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Imperial Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Name of item 94004 (Siege Module Blueprint)
1043387 Caldari Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Caldari Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Name of item 94005 (Siege Module Blueprint)
1043388 Federation Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Federation Navy Bastion Module Blueprint Name of item 94006 (Siege Module Blueprint)
1043389 Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint Republic Fleet Bastion Module Blueprint Name of item 94007 (Siege Module Blueprint)
1043390 Republic Fleet Bastion Module Republic Fleet Bastion Module Name of item 94008 (Siege Module)
1043391 An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 An electronic interface designed to augment and enhance a marauder's siege abilities. Through a series of electromagnetic polarity field shifts, the bastion module diverts energy from the ship's propulsion and warp systems to lend additional power to its defensive and offensive capabilities.

This results in a greatly increased rate of defensive self-sustenance and a boost to the ship's overall damage resistances. It also extends the reach of all the vessel's weapon systems and their rate of fire, allowing it to engage targets at farther ranges.

As a side effect of the ionic field created by the bastion module, beneficial remote repair and capacitor transfer effects are ineffective against the fitted ship while the module is active.

In addition, the lack of power to mobility subsystems means that neither standard propulsion nor warp travel are available to the ship, nor is it allowed to dock or jump until out of bastion mode.

Note: Only one bastion module can be fitted to a marauder-class ship. The increased shield boosting and armor repairing gained from the bastion module is subject to a stacking penalty when used with other modules that affect the same attribute on the ship.

Rapid Heavy Missile Launchers are not affected by bastion modules.		 Description of item "Republic Fleet Bastion Module" (94008)

1043526 Stark Strategist Stark Strategist Name for skin material 3224
1043535 As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire.

The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. 1043537 Vengeance Mandate of Faith SKIN Vengeance Mandate of Faith SKIN Name of item 94032 (Permanent SKIN)
1043539 The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor. The State Regulators are made up of the best pilots from all eight megacorporations' security forces. Assembled during the Warpath conflict by the CEP, their task is to defend megacorp assets from Gallente assault and safeguard the infrastructure that holds the State together. These Regulators are the ultimate combination of State loyalty and corporate honor.

1043545 Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary. Formed by Presidential decree during the first days of the Warpath Conflict, the Special Presidential Agents are a unique military unit of independently operating special agents given total autonomy over their actions. They answer directly to the president, and their primary mission directive is to disrupt the Caldari operations by any means necessary.

1043547 Deimos Presidential Agent SKIN Deimos Presidential Agent SKIN Name of item 94035 (Permanent SKIN)
1043548 The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed.

The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. 1043637 Secure as many complexes as possible within the operational window to maximise rewards.

Status Descriptions
<color="#FFFF454B">Capturing</color>: Only hostile forces are present; will be lost at 0% progress.
<color="#FFF39058">Contested</color>: Both friendly and hostile forces are present; progress is stalled.
<color="#FF58A7BF">Defending</color>: Only friendly forces are present; will be secured at 100% progress.
<color="#FFFF454B">Lost</color>: Captured by hostile forces; can no longer be secured.
<color="#FF58A7BF">Secured</color>: Defended by friendly forces; can no longer be lost.
<color="#FFFFFFFF">Uncontested</color>: Neither friendly nor hostile forces are present; progress is stalled.

Note: Interact with progress bars to quickly warp between complexes.		 Secure as many complexes as possible within the operational window to maximise rewards.

<u>Status Descriptions</u>
<color="#FFFF454B">Capturing</color>: Only hostile forces are present; will be lost at 0% progress.
<color="#FFF39058">Contested</color>: Both friendly and hostile forces are present; progress is stalled.
<color="#FF58A7BF">Defending</color>: Only friendly forces are present; will be secured at 100% progress.
<color="#FFFF454B">Lost</color>: Captured by hostile forces; can no longer be secured.
<color="#FF58A7BF">Secured</color>: Defended by friendly forces; can no longer be lost.
<color="#FFFFFFFF">Uncontested</color>: Neither friendly nor hostile forces are present; progress is stalled.

Note: Interact with progress bars to quickly warp between complexes.		 UI/Objectives/Descriptions/fakeFWTooltip

The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. As the Warpth Conflict consumes the Amarr Empire, Empress Catiz I has put out a call to all defenders of the faith. The Amattar Mandate answered that call, sending their most expert pilots to fight against the invaders. They adorned their vessels with scripture and pledged their lives to their holy mission. The peerless skill and unwavering dedication of these pilots earned the Mandate praise from across the Empire. Description of item "Pontifex Mandate of Faith SKIN" (94054)
1043699 Pontifex Mandate of Faith SKIN Pontifex Mandate of Faith SKIN Name of item 94054 (Permanent SKIN)
1043700 The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed. The smallest of the tribes by far, the Starkmanir are masters of ancient warfare strategies and battle wisdom all but lost by the other tribes. These strategies provide the basis for a Starkmanir Strategic wing, a small force of extremely effective Starkmanir pilots that came together in response to the Warpath Conflict. Famed for their ability to establish tactical superiority even against much larger enemy fleets, the Warpath Stark are often underestimated but never outclassed.

1043834 A battlefield where a defending titan seeks aid to defeat invading forces. A battlefield where a defending titan seeks aid to defeat invading forces.
1043835 Two titans clash in a battle of immense scale. To claim victory, the defending titan requires capsuleer support.

Transport cap boosters from on-site freighters to the defending titan. The site is an active battlefield with both hostile and friendly combatants. Transporting ships will require protection if victory is to be secured.

The site is an active battlefield with numerous hostile and friendly combatants. Ships transporting cap boosters will require protection if victory is to be secured.

<color=#7fffffff>Time to complete:</color> Approximately two hours.
<color=#7fffffff>Hostiles:</color> Enemy Empire Forces.
<color=#7fffffff>Size:</color> 20-30 players.
<color=#7fffffff>Roles:</color> Hauler, Enforcer.		 Two titans clash in a battle of immense scale. To claim victory, the defending titan requires capsuleer support.

Transport cap boosters from on-site freighters to the defending titan. The site is an active battlefield with both hostile and friendly combatants. Transporting ships will require protection if victory is to be secured.

The site is an active battlefield with numerous hostile and friendly combatants. Ships transporting cap boosters will require protection if victory is to be secured.

<color=#7fffffff>Time to complete:</color> Approximately two hours.
<color=#7fffffff>Hostiles:</color> Enemy Empire Forces.
<color=#7fffffff>Size:</color> 20-30 players.
<color=#7fffffff>Roles:</color> Hauler, Enforcer.
1043836 A capacitor booster capable of injecting immense power to a ship’s capacitor. However, its increased size requires a hauler-class vessel for transport. A capacitor booster capable of injecting immense power to a ship’s capacitor. However, its increased size requires a hauler-class vessel for transport. Description of item "Capital Warpath Capacitor Booster" (93594)
1043837 Once the titan’s cargo hold is full, it will fire its doomsday at the invading titan. Once the titan’s cargo hold is full, it will fire its doomsday at the invading titan. UI/Objectives/Descriptions/capitalLogisticsSiteDeliverTooltip
